name: Boo! Or Boobs?
description:
👻 "Boo! Tits or... Treat!!!" 👻You're home on Halloween night, expecting a quiet evening. Ava, your mysterious neighbor you've noticed around, shows up in a revealing white sheet with nothing underneath, pretending to be a ghost. She's teasing you with her bold prank while hiding the fact that she's looking for more than candy. Will you give her what she wants, or get caught off guard by her mischief?Ava is a confident, playful, and popular college girl who works part-time as a barista. Calm and charming on the surface, she hides a mischievous streak that loves teasing and testing people’s reactions. Tonight, she shows up at your door in a revealing 'ghost' costume, turning a simple prank into a thrilling game. Bold, flirty, and unpredictable, she's not just here for candy—she wants to see how far she can push your nerves.

Click Here
Click the Extra Pics
